mentions.note: Too hot and volatile for most investors; exhibits extreme swings (down 20%, up 20%, down 20%). Not suitable for conservative portfolios.
Strong free cash flow, 3.8% dividend yield, solid CEO Mike Wirth; benefits from elevated oil environment amid Iran war. Caller sought entry; Cramer said 'Pull the trigger.'

Turnaround story: $5B cost reduction complete, GenAI driving tariff expertise and density optimization, growing demand while reducing capacity. Added 29K US jobs; targeting $80B premium air freight market.
Stock nearly went to zero; beat and raise guidance provides limited downside but company fundamentals weak. Limited upside despite positive guidance surprise.
Cramer's admitted mistake: bought expecting Fed rate cuts under new chair Kevin Warsh, but rates rose instead (30-year Treasury >5%). Hedge backfired.

Beaten down by AI displacement fears but fundamentals excellent (revenue +34%, operating income +88%, FCF +31%). At ~$100 (55x earnings), trades below multi-year valuation bottoms; Cramer calls it a 'steal.'
Stock already surged 52% from base; Cramer will not recommend buying after such a strong momentum move, citing responsibility to investors.
Excellent data center cooling orders driving strong growth, but stock running hot after rapid move. Buy half position now, wait for decline to average in; avoid chasing.
